never_reference: track names like LYR02, TRACK 7 -- internal catalog IDs

platform_rules.instagram: 3-5 lines, micro-story, hook first, 5-10 hashtags at end
platform_rules.tiktok: 1-2 lines ONLY, caption IS the hook, 3-5 hashtags
platform_rules.threads: 1-3 raw sentences, end with question, NO hashtags -- uses Topics
platform_rules.x: One bar or hot take, max 200 chars, 1-2 hashtags
platform_rules.bluesky: Same energy as X, max 250 chars, 1-2 hashtags

voice.brand: anti-hype, quiet authority, pattern recognition, earned confidence
voice.avoid: motivational poster language, generic rapper talk, forced metaphors

generic_closers: a step in the right direction
style_rules: No em dash overuse -- replace with commas or periods
No emojis as decoration (genuine expression only)
No negative parallelism (not just X, it's Y)
No synonym cycling for the same concept
soul_rules: Have opinions -- react to things, don't just report them
Vary rhythm -- short punchy then longer ones that breathe
Acknowledge complexity -- mixed feelings are human
Be specific about feelings, not vague about significance
Let the punchline land alone on its own line
Let some mess in -- perfect structure feels algorithmic
Sound like a person texting real thoughts, not a press release

cta_rotation: send this to someone who needs to hear it
drop a comment if you felt that
follow for more -- album on the way
